# GolfLabs

> 24/7 self-service golf simulator in Southampton, NJ. No membership required.

## About

GolfLabs is a private, 1-bay golf simulator facility at 133 Eayrestown Rd, Southampton, NJ 08088. Open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year. Fully self-service — no staff on-site. Book online, get a smart lock unlock link via email, tap to enter, and play.

## Pricing

- Off-Peak (2am–9am): $25/hr
- Peak (9am–2am): $35/hr
- 15-minute minimum booking
- No membership fees, no initiation fees, no hidden charges
- Same price for 1–4 people

## Technology

- Uneekor EYE Mini SimKit (overhead launch monitor)
- GameDay simulation software with 50+ world-famous courses
- Ball data: ball speed, launch angle, side angle, backspin, sidespin, total spin, carry distance
- Club data (with reflective sticker): club speed, club path, angle of attack, smash factor, face angle, dynamic loft
- Courses include: Pebble Beach, St Andrews, Bethpage Black, and more

## Amenities

- Private bay (fits up to 4 people)
- BYOB — fridge provided
- Right-handed clubs available in the bay
- Free parking
- Couch seating area
- Club stickers provided for club data tracking

## Location

- Address: 133 Eayrestown Rd, Southampton, NJ 08088
- Phone: (856) 745-1025
- Near Pivotal Training gym, off Route 206
- Free parking right outside

## Booking

- Book online at https://app.golflabs.us/dashboard?tab=book
- Available up to a month in advance
- Confirmation email sent immediately
- Unlock link sent 15 minutes before session
- Payment via Stripe (secure checkout)

## Service Area

Burlington County NJ and surrounding areas including: Southampton, Mount Holly, Medford, Lumberton, Pemberton, Marlton, Moorestown, Burlington Township, Eastampton, Hainesport, Shamong, Tabernacle, Vincentown, Browns Mills, Bordentown, Willingboro, Cherry Hill, Evesham, Mount Laurel

## Links

- Website: https://golflabs.us
- Book Now: https://app.golflabs.us/dashboard?tab=book
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/golflabs.us
- About: https://golflabs.us/about
- FAQ: https://golflabs.us/faq
- Getting Started: https://golflabs.us/getting-started
